events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the hazard assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Key call: **fail / critical risk** — inadequate bracing/kickers during an active pour is a blowout/collapse hazard per ACI 347 lateral-pressure design requirements. Immediate actions center on stopping the pour, evacuating the hazard zone, and having an engineer verify/correct the bracing before resuming.
